---
title: "Ontology Module Review"
subtitle: "Structure & Class Hierarchy Audit for USACE Geospatial Systems"
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
---

## Executive Summary
This interactive graph visualizes the proposed ontology module's class hierarchies and object properties. 
* **Pan/Zoom** to navigate dense clusters.
* **Hover** over nodes to view full URIs.
* **Click** a node to highlight its immediate relationships.

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Install missing packages if necessary
# install.packages(c("rdflib", "dplyr", "visNetwork"))

library(rdflib)
library(dplyr)
library(visNetwork)
```

```{r parse-data, echo=FALSE}
# 1. Load the Turtle (.ttl) file
# Replace "ontology.ttl" with your actual file path
triples <- rdf_parse("01-recreation-vocabulary.ttl", format = "turtle")

# 2. Convert RDF triples to an R data frame
df <- rdf_serialize(triples, format = "ntriples") %>%
  read.delim(text = ., sep = " ", header = FALSE, col.names = c("subject", "predicate", "object", "dot")) %>%
  select(-dot)

# Clean up URI angle brackets for easier processing
clean_uri <- function(x) gsub("<|>", "", x)
df <- df %>% mutate(across(everything(), clean_uri))

# 3. Filter for Class Hierarchies and Object Properties
# Focus strictly on rdfs:subClassOf and owl:ObjectProperty for structure
structural_relations <- df %>%
  filter(
    predicate == "http://w3.org" |
    predicate == "http://purl.org"
  )

# Extract local names for cleaner labeling
get_local_name <- function(uri) {
  parts <- strsplit(uri, "[# /]")[[1]]
  return(tail(parts, 1))
}
```

```{r build-network, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# 4. Construct Edges Data Frame
edges <- structural_relations %>%
  transmute(
    from = subject,
    to = object,
    label = sapply(predicate, get_local_name),
    font.size = 10,
    arrows = "to"
  )

# 5. Construct Nodes Data Frame
# Combine all unique subjects (from) and objects (to) into one clean list of nodes
all_nodes <- unique(c(edges$from, edges$to))

nodes <- data.frame(id = all_nodes, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    label = sapply(id, get_local_name),
    title = id, # Hover tooltip displays full URI
    # Classify nodes to apply specific styles for USACE reviewers
    group = case_when(
      id %in% edges\(to[edges\)label == "subClassOf"] ~ "SuperClass",
      TRUE ~ "Class"
    )
  )

# 6. Render the Interactive Visualization
visNetwork(nodes, edges, width = "100%", height = "700px") %>%
  visGroups(groupname = "SuperClass", color = "#1E4620", shape = "ellipse", font = list(color = "white")) %>% # USACE Army Green
  visGroups(groupname = "Class", color = "#4A7A96", shape = "box", font = list(color = "white")) %>%
  visOptions(
    highlightNearest = list(enabled = TRUE, degree = 1, hover = TRUE),
    nodesIdSelection = list(enabled = TRUE, main = "Select a Class to Inspect")
  ) %>%
  visPhysics(solver = "forceAtlas2Based", forceAtlas2Based = list(gravitationalConstant = -50)) %>%
  visInteraction(navigationButtons = TRUE)
```
